description: Identify optimal tidepooling and clamming windows by analyzing tide data. The results should include summary statistics and recommended days for low tides occurring during daylight hours (7 AM-7 PM) with heights of 1.5 ft or less, including calculated activity window durations.

natural_language.prompt: You have a week of tide data. Find which days have low tides during daylight hours (7 AM to 7 PM) with heights of 1.5 feet or less, and calculate how long the safe activity window lasts. Summarize which days are best for tidepooling or clamming.
